zh.Bucklow, Cheshire, England: 英國爾巴可洛福 希爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Clemence Dutton於1298年出生在英國爾黑阿德爾時，她的父親Roger Dutton de Cheadle18歲，母親Matilda de Massey18歲。她於1319年與William de Baguley III在英國爾黑阿德爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭爾達頓。

zh-hans.Bucklow, Cheshire, England: 英国爾巴可洛福 希爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Clemence Dutton于1298年出生在英国爾黑阿德爾时，她的父亲Roger Dutton de Cheadle18岁，母亲Matilda de Massey18岁。她于1319年与William de Baguley III在英国爾黑阿德爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰爾達頓。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Clemence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French and English form of Latin Clementia, a derivative of Clemens ( see Clement ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘mercy’. It was fairly popular in Britain from the late medieval period until the 17th century, but has since been used less often.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Clemence Dutton was born in 1298, in Cheadle, Cheshire, England, her father, Roger Dutton de Cheadle, was 18 and her mother, Matilda de Massey, was 18. She married William de Baguley III in 1319, in Cheadle, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clemence Dutton est née en 1298, à Cheadle, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Dutton de Cheadle, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Massey, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé William de Baguley III en 1319, à Cheadle, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Clemence Dutton 1298 in Cheadle, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Dutton de Cheadle 18 und ihre Mutter Matilda de Massey 18. Sie hat 1319 in Cheadle, Cheshire, England William de Baguley III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Clemence Dutton è nata il nel 1298 nel Cheadle, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Roger Dutton de Cheadle, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Matilda de Massey, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato William de Baguley III nel 1319, nel Cheadle, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Dutton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Clemence Duttonが1298年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェアドルで生まれた時，父Roger Dutton de Cheadleは18歳，母Matilda de Masseyは18歳であった。1319年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェアドルでWilliam de Baguley IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Clemence Dutton(이)가 1298년 영국 체실르 체아들일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Dutton de Cheadle(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Massey(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1319년 영국 체실르 체아들일에서 William de Baguley III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 사망했다.

mn.Dutton, Cheshire, England: Dutton, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clemence Dutton nasceu em 1298, em Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Dutton de Cheadle, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Massey, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Baguley III em 1319, em Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clemence Dutton родилась в 1298 г. в местности чидл, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Dutton de Cheadle было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Massey, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Baguley III в 1319 г. в местности чидл, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Clemence Dutton nació en 1298, en Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Dutton de Cheadle, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Matilda de Massey, tenía 18 años. Se casó con William de Baguley III en 1319, en Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
